name: han-linear
description: Linear-facing Han skill for publishing work items to a Linear team as issues.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a work-items file into Linear issues, one per slice.
interface.longDescription: Linear-facing Han skill for publishing work items to Linear. Creates one issue per slice in a single target team, resolving states, labels, Projects, and members against the team's real configuration before creating anything. Links dependencies between issues as native blocked-by relations. Requires a configured Linear MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Create Linear issues from these work items.
Publish this work-items file to my Linear team.
Turn my plan into Linear tickets.
